amavat a. Ved.
1 Violent, strong, stormy (winds); powerful (sound also).
2 Persevering, constant.
3 Capable, fit, proper.
4 Attended by ministers.
5 Attended by diseases.
6 Possessed of self.
— ind. Violently.
